title: Monitoring heartbeat indicator and metric-path logging
description: Rename the dashboard Overview page to Monitoring, reintroduce heartbeat as the final monitoring dot, and add detailed agent/server logs for metric collection, frame sending, and server receipt.
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard navigation and page documentation use Monitoring instead of Overview.
Monitoring rows show Heartbeat as the final dot after Proc.
Heartbeat is green when the server considers the agent connected, grey when offline/no heartbeat has been seen, and blue in maintenance.
Agent logs include collected metric summaries and outgoing frame send details.
Server logs include inbound frame details, decoded metric summaries, and heartbeat receipt details.
Docs, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel are updated.

tasks.title: Restore heartbeat monitoring dot
tasks.description: Update dashboard status modeling and rendering to include a Heartbeat component as the final monitoring indicator and rename the Overview view to Monitoring.
acceptance_criteria: dashboard/src/models.ts includes heartbeat as a ComponentKey.
dashboard/src/status.ts appends heartbeat as the last component for metric, no-data, and maintenance states.
dashboard/src/main.tsx uses Monitoring for the nav label, page condition, table component, and alert strip condition.
dashboard/src/status.test.ts verifies heartbeat is last and has connected/offline/maintenance colors.

unit: Extend dashboard/src/status.test.ts with GIVEN/WHEN/THEN tests for heartbeat component ordering and state colors.

tasks.implementation_notes: Added heartbeat to ComponentKey and status component construction, made it the final table dot, and renamed the visible nav/table view to Monitoring.

tasks.title: Add metric-path diagnostics
tasks.description: Add concise debug/trace logs to show what agents collect, what frames they send, and what metrics the server receives.
acceptance_criteria: Agent collection logs include CPU, memory, disk, network, temperature, process, uptime, host, and platform summary fields.
Agent send logs include frame type, agent id, encoded frame size, and payload size.
Server receive logs include frame identity, frame type, payload size, decoded metric summary, and heartbeat timestamp.

unit: Run existing collector and integration coverage after adding logging because the behavior should remain unchanged.

tasks.implementation_notes: Added local frame-type and metric-summary helpers in agent/agent.cpp and server/server.cpp. Agent logs collected metrics and outgoing frames; server logs decoded inbound frames, received metric summaries, and heartbeat receipt.

tasks.title: Document and version
tasks.description: Update docs, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel for Monitoring and the new metric-path diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md records the Monitoring heartbeat and logging changes.
docs/dashboard.md describes Monitoring and the Heartbeat dot.
tasks.implementation_notes: Bumped MODULE.bazel to 0.2.25 and updated CHANGELOG.md, docs/dashboard.md, docs/running.md, and docs/logging.md.
